animeVanguardsCodes.title: Anime Vanguards Codes
animeVanguardsCodes.intro: Redeem the latest Anime Vanguards codes for Trait Rerolls, Memoria Shards, Iced Teas, Gems, Gold, Stat Chips, and event materials. Copy active codes, check recently expired codes, and follow the safe redeem path from the Profile menu.
animeVanguardsCodes.lastChecked: Last checked for Eternal Adversaries Update 13.5

activeCodes.rewards: 50 Trait Rerolls, 50 Memoria Shards, 5 Rainbow Essence Stones

redeemSteps.title: Join and Progress
redeemSteps.description: Join Anime Vanguards on Roblox and progress until code redemption is available.

redeemSteps.title: Reach the Level Gate
redeemSteps.description: Reach Level 10 for the basic code menu; newer codes like the Eternal Adversaries set require Level 30.

redeemSteps.title: Open the Profile Menu
redeemSteps.description: Tap the blue Profile button on the right side of the screen.

redeemSteps.title: Select the Codes Option
redeemSteps.description: Choose the purple Codes option inside the Profile window.

redeemSteps.title: Paste and Redeem
redeemSteps.description: Paste the code exactly as written, then press Redeem to receive the rewards.

rewardTypes.name: Trait Rerolls
rewardTypes.description: Reroll unit traits for stronger damage, utility, or support setups.

rewardTypes.name: Memoria Shards
rewardTypes.description: Progress toward Memoria upgrades and event systems.

rewardTypes.name: Iced Teas
rewardTypes.description: Spend on Eternal Adversaries summer event rewards.

rewardTypes.name: Stat Chips
rewardTypes.description: Improve unit stat rolls before committing long-term resources.

rewardTypes.name: Gold
rewardTypes.description: Pay for upgrades, shops, and progression costs.

animeVanguardsBeginnerGuide.title: Anime Vanguards Beginner Guide
animeVanguardsBeginnerGuide.intro: Start with the correct Roblox experience, clear early progression, unlock code redemption, and build a team around summons, upgrades, and events in Anime Vanguards.

steps.title: Join the Correct Game
steps.description: Open Anime Vanguards: Eternal Adversaries on Roblox by Kitawari with game ID 16146832113.

steps.title: Understand the Core Loop
steps.description: Summon units to defend against enemies, level them up, evolve stronger versions, and clear more difficult battles over time.

steps.title: Progress Until Codes Unlock
steps.description: Reach Level 10 before treating code lists as usable. Some newer rewards require higher account levels, including the Level 30 Eternal Adversaries codes.

steps.title: Use Early Rewards on Units First
steps.description: Spend Gems and reroll resources only after you know which unit you are building. Save premium resources for units you plan to use beyond early story clears.

steps.title: Build a Balanced Starter Team
steps.description: Combine damage, crowd control, support, and economy instead of stacking only damage units.

steps.title: Claim Reliable Free Income
steps.description: Daily rewards, achievements, daily quests, weekly quests, and event tasks provide Gems, Trait Rerolls, and progression materials.

steps.title: Move From Story Into Events
steps.description: After your first stable team is built, move into event tasks and rotating content such as Eternal Adversaries rewards, Summer Portals, and Summer event modes.

steps.title: Track Official Updates
steps.description: Use the official changelog, Discord, X account, and YouTube channel before spending rare materials so resource planning follows the current patch.

quickTips: Prioritize one main carry before spreading resources across many units.
Save Trait Rerolls and Stat Chips for units with a clear long-term role.
Clear daily and weekly quests for steady Gem and reroll income.
Check the official changelog before investing in banner pulls.

animeVanguardsUnitTierList.title: Anime Vanguards Unit Tier List
animeVanguardsUnitTierList.intro: A practical tier grid for current Anime Vanguards team building, covering meta cores, strong support pieces, progression units, and new Eternal Adversaries units. Prioritize one main carry, one control or support unit, and one economy or utility slot first.

tiers.description: Top-priority units that anchor late-game teams through damage, crowd control, economy, summons, or sustained pressure.

units.name: Demon Leader (Control)
units.note: Cuts deployment costs and boosts Demon Hunter allies.

units.name: God (Above Heaven)
units.note: Combines large area damage with a freeze-style control window.

units.name: Song Jinwu and Igros
units.note: Summons shadow soldiers without consuming normal placement slots.

units.name: Gujo (Infinity)
units.note: Uses wide-area control to hold enemies while carries deal damage.

units.name: Rogita (Super 4)
units.note: One of the strongest single-target damage picks in the current meta.

tiers.description: High-value units that fit hard content and pair well with SS-tier cores.

units.name: Demon Hybrid (Chainsaw)
units.note: Burst DPS for Demon Hunter teams and bleed detonation.

units.name: Brolzi Super (Wrathful)
units.note: Hard-stage DPS that fits the carry slot.

units.name: Divalo (Requiem)
units.note: Enemy speed control for boss waves and lane safety.

units.name: Teacher (Final Stand)
units.note: Team utility support for hard content.

tiers.description: Reliable units for players building toward harder content without a full SS-tier roster.

units.name: Iscanur (Pride)
units.note: Damage carry for general clears and event stages.

units.name: Okorun (Turbo)
units.note: Fast damage for speed clears and event teams.

units.name: Savior (Moonless)
units.note: Carry for story progression and late-game builds.

units.name: Explosive Demon (Bomb)
units.note: AoE damage for crowded waves and budget teams.

tiers.description: Useful units for players filling a working team before premium Secret, Vanguard, and Exclusive units are ready.

units.name: Deceiver (Monster)
units.note: Fallback carry for progression and story clears.

units.name: Fastest Shinobi (Flash)
units.note: Fast DPS for speed-focused clears and lane control.

units.name: Saber (Black Tyrant)
units.note: Progression carry bridging beginner teams to mid-game.

tiers.description: Newest units from Eternal Adversaries content worth evaluating before spending event materials and reroll resources.

animeVanguardsUnitsGuide.title: Anime Vanguards Units Guide
animeVanguardsUnitsGuide.intro: Learn unit roles, rarities, obtainment paths, starter choices, limited units, and what to check before spending scarce resources in Anime Vanguards.

cards.title: Starter Unit Choice
cards.howToGet: Choose one of the three starter units during early progression.
cards.investmentNote: Use starters to clear the first stages, then shift resources toward stronger summoned, event, Secret, Vanguard, or Exclusive units.

cards.title: Summon Banner Units
cards.units: God (Above Heaven), Gujo (Infinity), Demon Leader (Control), Rogita (Super 4), Ice Queen (Release), Alocard (Vampire King)
cards.howToGet: Use Gems and banner pulls when the target unit is available.
cards.investmentNote: Prioritize units that fill a clear role: carry damage, crowd control, economy support, or boss killing.

cards.title: Eternal Adversaries Banner Target
cards.investmentNote: Treat Vanguard-rarity banner units as high-resource targets and check traits, stats, and Memoria before rerolling heavily.

cards.title: Eternal Adversaries Worldlines Unit
cards.investmentNote: Secret units are long-term candidates when their role fits your main team and current event goals.

cards.title: Eternal Adversaries Event Pass Unit
cards.investmentNote: Event Pass units are valuable for collection and update-specific progression paths.

cards.title: Godly Ascension Battlepass Units
cards.investmentNote: Battlepass units are limited progression targets; check their evolved forms and Memoria links before spending premium rerolls.

cards.title: Godly Ascension Pirate Units
cards.units: Elastic Captain (Cog 5th), Bounty Hunter (King of Hell), Beast Pirate (Half-Dragon), Scrap Pirate (Metal)
cards.howToGet: Evolution Quests, Rift gameplay, and Godly Ascension content
cards.investmentNote: Use Pirate units for Update 13 progression paths such as Pirate Dynasty, Rift rewards, and evolution questlines.

cards.title: Before You Invest
cards.units: Rarity, Obtainment path, Role in team, Trait value, Stat rolls, Evolution materials, Memoria links, Current update usefulness
cards.howToGet: Review this checklist each time you consider spending premium resources.
cards.investmentNote: Spend Trait Rerolls and Stat Chips only after the unit has a clear job in your team.

animeVanguardsTraitsGuide.title: Anime Vanguards Traits Guide
animeVanguardsTraitsGuide.intro: Traits shape how each unit performs in Anime Vanguards. Understand how Trait Rerolls work, which traits fit each role, and when to save your reroll resources.

faqs.question: What are traits in Anime Vanguards?
faqs.answer: Traits are stat modifiers assigned to units. They adjust damage, range, attack speed, economy, or utility, and rerolling changes which trait a unit holds.

faqs.question: How does Trait Reroll work?
faqs.answer: Trait Rerolls swap the current trait for a new roll from the trait pool. Higher-value traits are rarer, so rerolling is best reserved for units you plan to use long-term.

faqs.question: Which traits fit damage carries?
faqs.answer: Damage carries benefit from traits that raise damage, crit rate, or attack speed, letting a single unit handle denser waves more efficiently.

faqs.question: Which traits fit support and economy units?
faqs.answer: Support and economy units benefit from traits that improve deployment cost reduction, range coverage, or team-wide buffs that amplify your carries.

faqs.question: When should I save Trait Rerolls?
faqs.answer: Save rerolls for Secret, Vanguard, and Exclusive units with a clear role. Rerolling weak or filler units wastes resources that are better spent on your core team.

animeVanguardsEvolutionsGuide.title: Anime Vanguards Evolutions Guide
animeVanguardsEvolutionsGuide.intro: Evolution and ascension are long-term progression milestones in Anime Vanguards. Follow a clean upgrade route that protects your resources and invests in the right units first.

steps.title: Identify Evolvable Units
steps.description: Check which units have an evolution or ascension path before investing, since only specific units can be upgraded to stronger forms.

steps.title: Gather Evolution Materials
steps.description: Collect the required materials such as Essence Stones, Memoria Shards, and event currencies from the maps and modes that drop them.

steps.title: Time Your Upgrades
steps.description: Evolve units that already hold a clear role in your team, rather than spending materials on units you may replace soon.

steps.title: Upgrade Traits and Stats First
steps.description: Lock in strong traits and stat rolls before evolving, since evolving amplifies the base unit you already built.

steps.title: Link Memoria Where Useful
steps.description: Connect Memoria to evolved units to extend their bonuses and fit them into themed teams such as Demon Hunter or Pirate setups.

steps.title: Rebuild Around Evolved Units
steps.description: Once a unit evolves, revisit your team composition so the upgraded unit takes its strongest position on the field.

animeVanguardsGameModesGuide.title: Anime Vanguards Game Modes Guide
animeVanguardsGameModesGuide.intro: Anime Vanguards offers multiple modes, each with its own team requirements and rewards. Use this overview to pick the right mode for your current goal.

modes.name: Story Mode
modes.description: Linear stages that teach the core loop and unlock systems as you progress.
modes.reward: Gems, Gold, and unit upgrade materials

modes.name: Raids
modes.description: Tougher multi-wave battles that test full-team builds and crowd control.
modes.reward: Essence Stones, Memoria Shards, and rare materials

modes.name: Rifts
modes.description: Time-limited rift content tied to update themes such as Pirate Dynasty.

modes.name: Events
modes.description: Limited-time modes like Eternal Adversaries Summer content with unique units.
modes.reward: Iced Teas, event units, and exclusive rewards

modes.name: Challenges
modes.description: Daily and weekly challenge tasks that reward steady progression income.

modes.name: Boss Events
modes.description: Special boss encounters that demand strong single-target and control units.

animeVanguardsUpdates.title: Anime Vanguards Updates and Events
animeVanguardsUpdates.intro: Track current Anime Vanguards updates, seasonal events, battle pass changes, new units, and mode additions so returning players can quickly see what changed.

entries.title: Eternal Adversaries Update 13.5
entries.description: Added new Eternal Adversaries units, Summer 26 Seasonal Banner, Summer Mode units, and new codes with a Level 30 requirement.

entries.title: Summer Event Modes
entries.description: Introduced Summer Portals, Summer Mode, and Iced Teas as a spendable event currency.

entries.title: Godly Ascension Update 13.0
entries.description: Added Battlepass Season 13 units, Pirate Dynasty content, Rift gameplay, and new evolution questlines.

entries.title: Worldlines Content
entries.description: Added Worldlines with new Secret unit targets and themed progression paths.

entries.title: Balance and Memoria Updates
entries.description: Ongoing balance changes to units, traits, and Memoria links following community feedback and the current patch.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Anime Vanguards

questions.question: What is Anime Vanguards?
questions.answer: Anime Vanguards is a Roblox anime tower defense game by Kitawari where players summon units, level and evolve them, and clear story stages, raids, and limited-time events.

questions.question: How do I redeem Anime Vanguards codes?
questions.answer: Reach Level 10, open the blue Profile button, select the purple Codes option, paste the code, and press Redeem. Newer Eternal Adversaries codes require Level 30.

questions.question: Where can I play Anime Vanguards?
questions.answer: Anime Vanguards is playable on Roblox on PC and mobile. Join the official experience by Kitawari with game ID 16146832113.

questions.question: How do I get stronger units in Anime Vanguards?
questions.answer: Use Gems for banner summons, then upgrade, reroll traits, improve stats, and evolve units that hold a clear role in your team.

questions.question: What are the best resources to save in Anime Vanguards?
questions.answer: Save Trait Rerolls and Stat Chips for Secret, Vanguard, and Exclusive units. Spend Gems on banners that fit your team goals.

questions.question: Where can I follow Anime Vanguards updates?
questions.answer: Follow the official Anime Vanguards Discord, YouTube channel, X account, and the vanguards.gg changelog for the latest patch notes, new units, and event details.
